title: Ford interview + Al Forthan + SafeMoon paperwork — early-OSU prep
html:
TL;DR

  • April 10, 2021 prep-stack: what to wear for Ford interview, dad emailing the therapist, set up thing with Maya, Al Forthan Speech (finalize and submit by 21st), Toastmasters Monday @ 12, other scholarships on Rudy, documents for SafeMoon (bank statements & change address), bland Silicon Valley internship.
  • The Ford-interview-prep + Al-Forthan-speech-deadline + Toastmasters-meeting + scholarship-portal-grind clump is the load-bearing pre-OSU funding stack — this is the week the Ford pipeline cleared.
  • "documents for safemoon (bank statements & change address)" — KYC paperwork for an exchange or wallet. Earliest concrete corpus reference to SafeMoon, the BSC token Yahir held during the spring-2021 retail-crypto window.
  • "bland Silicon Valley internship" — Yahir is already, at 18, framing the SV-internship trope as "bland". Compare with the late 2021 drug thesis to Cameron for the same flavor of pre-emptive contrarian taste.
  • "Al Forthan Speech" references the al forthan memorial scholarship oration — the same April-21 deadline that drives the January preparation note.

Source quote

"-Al Forthan Speech. 21st (finalize and submit) / -Toast master meeting Monday @ 12 / -other scholarships on Rudy / -documents for safemoon (bank statements & change address) / -bland Silicon Valley internship"

Open questions

  • Did the Bland Silicon Valley internship actually get applied to? The May housing note doesn't reference it.
  • "have dad send a mail to therapist" — first explicit corpus reference to a therapist for either Yahir or his dad. Worth tracking forward.
  • "Rudy" — is this a scholarship aggregator, a person, or RaiseMe-style platform?

Wikilinks
